Two years and we have a new ACA (Auxiliary Care Center). Always great service and the bathrooms are perfect.

reviews.comment:
Todo bien en gral. Vivo cerca y voy siempre. Pero a veces hay colas largas y encima un solo playero a la noche y en vez de ir cargando dos autos a la vez, te hacen pasar pero hasta que no llena uno y le cobra, no empieza con el otro, eso hace que se forme una fila larga y hace perder mucho tiempo.

(Translated by Google)
Everything's fine in general. I live nearby and go there often. But sometimes there are long lines, and on top of that, there's only one attendant at night. Instead of filling up two cars at once, they let you go first, but they don't start on the other until they've filled up one and charged the attendant. This creates a long line and wastes a lot of time.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlcG9qajhBRRAB
